heading: Pass-thru of items to shareholders
label: 1366 Pass-thru of items to shareholders
notes: Amendments2018—Subsec. (e). substituted “section 704(e)(2)” for “section 704(e)(3)”.Pub. L. 115–1412007—Subsec. (d)(4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 110–1722004—Subsec. (d)(2). reenacted heading without change and amended text of par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Any loss or deduction which is disallowed for any taxable year by reason of paragraph (1) shall be treated as incurred by the corporation in the succeeding taxable year with respect to that shareholder.”Pub. L. 108–3571996—Subsec. (a)(1). , inserted “, or of a trust or estate which terminates,” after “who dies” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 104–188, § 1302(e)Subsec. (d)(1)(A). , substituted “paragraphs (1) and (2)(A)” for “paragraph (1)”.Pub. L. 104–188, § 1309(a)(1)Subsec. (d)(3)(D). , added subpar. (D).Pub. L. 104–188, § 1312Subsec. (g). , struck out subsec. (g) which provided a cross reference to subchapter D of chapter 63 of this title.Pub. L. 104–188, § 1307(c)(3)(A)1989—Subsec. (f)(2). substituted “Treatment of tax imposed on built-in gains” for “Reduction in pass-thru for tax imposed on built-in gains” in heading and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “If any tax is imposed under section 1374 for any taxable year on an S corporation, for purposes of subsection (a), the amount of each recognized built-in gain (within the meaning of section 1374) for such taxable year shall be reduced by its proportionate share of such tax.”Pub. L. 101–2391988—Subsec. (f)(2). substituted “within the meaning of section 1374” for “as defined in section 1374(d)(2)”.Pub. L. 100–6471986—Subsec. (f)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (2), reduction in pass-thru for tax imposed on capital gain, read as follows: “If any tax is imposed under section 1374 for any taxable year on an S corporation, for purposes of subsection (a)—Pub. L. 99–514, § 632(c)(2)“(A) the amount of the corporation’s long-term capital gains for the taxable year shall be reduced by the amount of such tax, and“(B) if the amount of such tax exceeds the amount of such long-term capital gains, the corporation’s gains from sales or exchanges of property described in section 1231 shall be reduced by the amount of such excess.For purposes of the preceding sentence, the term ‘long-term capital gain’ shall not include any gain from the sale or exchange of property described in section 1231.”, struck out “56 or” before “1374”.Pub. L. 99–514, § 701(e)(4)(K)1984—Subsec. (f). , substituted “section 34” for “section 39” in heading and text.Pub. L. 98–369, § 474(r)(26)Subsec. (f)(1). , substituted “and special fuels” for “, special fuels, and lubricating oil”.Pub. L. 98–369, § 735(c)(16)

children.heading: Determination of shareholder’s tax liability
children.label: a Determination of shareholder’s tax liability

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
A
children.text: items of income (including tax-exempt income), loss, deduction, or credit the separate treatment of which could affect the liability for tax of any shareholder, and

children.label: B
children.text: nonseparately computed income or loss.

children.heading: Nonseparately computed income or loss defined
children.label: 2 Nonseparately computed income or loss defined
children.text: For purposes of this subchapter, the term “nonseparately computed income or loss” means gross income minus the deductions allowed to the corporation under this chapter, determined by excluding all items described in paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Character passed thru
children.label: b Character passed thru
children.text: The character of any item included in a shareholder’s pro rata share under paragraph (1) of subsection (a) shall be determined as if such item were realized directly from the source from which realized by the corporation, or incurred in the same manner as incurred by the corporation.

children.heading: Gross income of a shareholder
children.label: c Gross income of a shareholder
children.text: In any case where it is necessary to determine the gross income of a shareholder for purposes of this title, such gross income shall include the shareholder’s pro rata share of the gross income of the corporation.

children.heading: Special rules for losses and deductions
children.label: d Special rules for losses and deductions

children.heading: Cannot exceed shareholder’s basis in stock and debt
children.label: 1 Cannot exceed shareholder’s basis in stock and debt
A
children.text: the adjusted basis of the shareholder’s stock in the S corporation (determined with regard to paragraphs (1) and (2)(A) of section 1367(a) for the taxable year), and

children.label: B
children.text: the shareholder’s adjusted basis of any indebtedness of the S corporation to the shareholder (determined without regard to any adjustment under paragraph (2) of section 1367(b) for the taxable year).

children.heading: Indefinite carryover of disallowed losses and deductions
children.label: 2 Indefinite carryover of disallowed losses and deductions

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), any loss or deduction which is disallowed for any taxable year by reason of paragraph (1) shall be treated as incurred by the corporation in the succeeding taxable year with respect to that shareholder.

children.heading: Transfers of stock between spouses or incident to divorce
children.label: B Transfers of stock between spouses or incident to divorce
children.text: In the case of any transfer described in section 1041(a) of stock of an S corporation, any loss or deduction described in subparagraph (A) with respect such stock shall be treated as incurred by the corporation in the succeeding taxable year with respect to the transferee.

children.heading: Carryover of disallowed losses and deductions to post-termination transition period
children.label: 3 Carryover of disallowed losses and deductions to post-termination transition period

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If for the last taxable year of a corporation for which it was an S corporation a loss or deduction was disallowed by reason of paragraph (1), such loss or deduction shall be treated as incurred by the shareholder on the last day of any post-termination transition period.

children.heading: Cannot exceed shareholder’s basis in stock
children.label: B Cannot exceed shareholder’s basis in stock
children.text: The aggregate amount of losses and deductions taken into account by a shareholder under subparagraph (A) shall not exceed the adjusted basis of the shareholder’s stock in the corporation (determined at the close of the last day of the post-termination transition period and without regard to this paragraph).

children.heading: Adjustment in basis of stock
children.label: C Adjustment in basis of stock
children.text: The shareholder’s basis in the stock of the corporation shall be reduced by the amount allowed as a deduction by reason of this paragraph.

children.heading: At-risk limitations
children.label: D At-risk limitations
children.text: To the extent that any increase in adjusted basis described in subparagraph (B) would have increased the shareholder’s amount at risk under section 465 if such increase had occurred on the day preceding the commencement of the post-termination transition period, rules similar to the rules described in subparagraphs (A) through (C) shall apply to any losses disallowed by reason of section 465(a).

children.heading: Application of limitation on charitable contributions
children.label: 4 Application of limitation on charitable contributions
A
children.text: the shareholder’s pro rata share of such contribution, over

children.label: B
children.text: the shareholder’s pro rata share of the adjusted basis of such property.

children.heading: Treatment of family group
children.label: e Treatment of family group
children.text: If an individual who is a member of the family (within the meaning of section 704(e)(2) of one or more shareholders of an S corporation renders services for the corporation or furnishes capital to the corporation without receiving reasonable compensation therefor, the Secretary shall make such adjustments in the items taken into account by such individual and such shareholders as may be necessary in order to reflect the value of such services or capital.

children.heading: Special rules
children.label: f Special rules

children.heading: Subsection (a) not to apply to credit allowable under section 34
children.label: 1 Subsection (a) not to apply to credit allowable under section 34
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to any credit allowable under section 34 (relating to certain uses of gasoline and special fuels).

children.heading: Treatment of tax imposed on built-in gains
children.label: 2 Treatment of tax imposed on built-in gains
children.text: If any tax is imposed under section 1374 for any taxable year on an S corporation, for purposes of subsection (a), the amount so imposed shall be treated as a loss sustained by the S corporation during such taxable year. The character of such loss shall be determined by allocating the loss proportionately among the recognized built-in gains giving rise to such tax.

children.heading: Reduction in pass-thru for tax imposed on excess net passive income
children.label: 3 Reduction in pass-thru for tax imposed on excess net passive income
A
children.text: the amount of such item, bears to

children.label: B
children.text: the total passive investment income for the taxable year.
